titles.title: Lord I Cast All My Cares Upon You

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When my cross is too heavy to carry, When trials too hard to bear I will lift mine eyes to mount Calvary where He died Lord I leave every burden there

verse.name: v2
v3
verse.lines: You can give all your heartache to Jesus He's a faithful compassionate Friend He's the Master, the Savior and the Healer That you prayed for Just look to mount Calvary and say

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Burdens are lifted at Calvary, Calvary, Calvary. All your burdens are lifted at Calvary Jesus is very near

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Anytime I don't know what to do, I will cast all my cares upon You.
